name: send_message
description: Send SMS/MMS message via Telnyx. Use this to send text messages to phone numbers. For listing messages, use list_messages instead.

from.description: Sender phone number (must be a Telnyx number you own)

name: list_messages
description: List sent and received SMS/MMS messages. Use this to view message history. For sending new messages, use send_message instead.

page_size.description: Number of messages to return per page

name: create_call
description: Create an outbound voice call via Telnyx. Use this to initiate phone calls. For listing active calls, use list_calls; for getting call details, use get_call.

connection_id.description: SIP connection ID for routing the call

name: list_calls
description: List all active and recent calls. Use this to monitor ongoing calls. For creating new calls, use create_call; for call details, use get_call.

name: get_call
description: Get details of a specific call by ID. Use this to retrieve call status and metadata. For listing all calls, use list_calls instead.

name: hangup_call
description: Hang up an active call by ID. Use this to terminate ongoing calls. For listing calls, use list_calls.

name: list_numbers
description: List phone numbers associated with your Telnyx account. Use this to view owned numbers. For searching available numbers to purchase, use search_numbers.

page_size.description: Number of numbers to return per page

name: search_numbers
description: Search for available phone numbers to purchase. Use this to find numbers before ordering. For viewing your owned numbers, use list_numbers; for purchasing, use order_number.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

name: order_number
description: Order/purchase phone numbers from Telnyx. Use this to buy available numbers. For searching available numbers, use search_numbers.

phone_numbers.description: JSON array of phone numbers to order (e.g., [+1234567890])

name: list_connections
description: List all SIP connections for your Telnyx account. Use this to view available connections. For creating new connections, use create_connection.

name: create_connection
description: Create a new SIP connection for voice routing. Use this to set up SIP trunking. For listing connections, use list_connections.

name: send_fax
description: Send a fax via Telnyx. Use this to transmit fax documents. For listing sent faxes, use list_faxes.

name: list_faxes
description: List all sent and received faxes. Use this to view fax history. For sending new faxes, use send_fax.

name: get_balance
description: Get your Telnyx account balance and billing information. Use this to check remaining credits.
